mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE openid = #{openid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(id, openid, unionid, appid, nickname, avatar_url, status, registered_at, last_login_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{appid}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, 'active', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
INSERT INTO user_profiles(user_id, city, bio, phone_country_code, phone_masked, gender, birthday) VALUES(#{userId}, '', '', NULL, '', NULL, NULL)
INSERT INTO user_credit(user_id, credit_score, no_show_count, withdraw_count, complete_count, report_count, risk_level, restricted_until, notes) VALUES(#{userId}, 100, 0, 0, 0, 0, 'normal', NULL, '')
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_sessions(id, user_id, session_token, expires_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{sessionToken}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM app_sessions WHERE session_token = #{sessionToken} AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profiles SET city = COALESCE(#{city}, city), bio = COALESCE(#{bio}, bio), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_blocks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_user_id = #{targetUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_blocks(id, user_id, blocked_user_id, reason) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{targetUserId}, #{reason})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_blocks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND blocked_user_id = #{targetUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user_credit WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM wallet_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_accounts(user_id, total_balance, withdrawable_balance, bonus_balance, frozen_balance, currency) VALUES(#{userId}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 'CNY')

INSERT INTO wallet_ledger( id, user_id, biz_type, biz_id, direction, currency, change_amount, withdrawable_change_amount, bonus_change_amount, frozen_change_amount, total_after, withdrawable_after, bonus_after, frozen_after, remark, operator_type, operator_id ) VALUES( #{id}, #{userId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{direction}, 'CNY', #{changeAmount}, #{withdrawableChange}, #{bonusChange}, #{frozenChange}, #{totalAfter}, #{withdrawableAfter}, #{bonusAfter}, #{frozenAfter}, #{remark}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId} )

INSERT INTO notifications(id, user_id, type, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, read_status, extra_json) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, 'unread', #{extraJson})
mapper.select: SELECT type, COUNT(1) AS total FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 'unread' GROUP BY type
mapper.update:
UPDATE notifications SET read_status = 'read', read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id IN
#{id}
UPDATE notifications SET read_status = 'read', read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND read_status = 'unread'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activities( id, organizer_user_id, title, category, description, location_name, location_address, latitude, longitude, area_code, cover_url, fee_mode, fee_amount, fee_desc, review_status, activity_status, settlement_status, publish_fee_amount, publish_fee_paid, publish_fee_order_id, accepted_fee_total, participant_count, capacity, start_at, end_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{description}, #{locationName}, #{locationAddress}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{areaCode}, #{coverUrl}, #{feeMode}, #{feeAmount}, #{feeDesc}, 'pending', 'open', 'pending', #{publishFee}, 1, #{publishFeeOrderId}, 0, 1, #{capacity}, #{startAt}, #{endAt} )

INSERT INTO payment_orders(id, order_no, user_id, order_type, biz_id, amount, status, channel, client_request_id, paid_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, 'publish_fee', #{bizId}, #{amount}, 'success', 'wallet_balance', #{clientRequestId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
INSERT INTO activity_participants(id, activity_id, user_id, role, join_status) VALUES(#{id}, #{activityId}, #{userId}, 'organizer', 'organizer')
INSERT INTO activity_media(id, activity_id, media_type, media_url, sort_no) VALUES(#{id}, #{activityId}, 'image', #{mediaUrl}, #{sortNo})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM applications a INNER JOIN activities ac ON a.activity_id = ac.id WHERE ac.organizer_user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM activities WHERE organizer_user_id = #{userId} AND activity_status = 'ended'
SELECT u.*, p.city, p.bio, c.credit_score FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN user_credit c ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM activity_media WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC

SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS applicant_nickname, u.avatar_url AS applicant_avatar_url FROM applications a INNER JOIN users u ON a.applicant_user_id = u.id WHERE a.activity_id = #{activityId} AND a.applicant_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET activity_status = 'withdrawn', ended_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), ended_reason = 'organizer_withdraw', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{activityId}
UPDATE activities SET publish_fee_refunded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_settlements WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_reviews(id, activity_id, reviewer_admin_id, decision, reason) VALUES(#{id}, #{activityId}, #{reviewerAdminId}, #{decision}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activities WHERE activity_status = 'open' AND end_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ORDER BY end_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM activities WHERE id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_settlements( id, activity_id, organizer_user_id, participant_count, paid_participant_count, gross_accept_fee, organizer_income_amount, publish_fee_refund_amount, settlement_status, settlement_reason, rule_snapshot_json, settled_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{organizerUserId}, #{participantCount}, #{paidParticipantCount}, #{gross}, #{income}, #{refund}, #{settlementStatus}, #{reason}, #{ruleSnapshotJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET activity_status = 'ended', settlement_status = #{settlementStatus}, ended_at = COALESCE(ended_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)), ended_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{activityId}
UPDATE activity_participants SET join_status = 'ended', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND join_status IN ('accepted', 'paid')
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.nickname AS applicant_nickname, u.avatar_url AS applicant_avatar_url FROM applications a INNER JOIN users u ON a.applicant_user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{applicationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE applications SET status = #{status}, accepted_by_user_id = #{acceptedByUserId}, decision_reason = #{reason}, accepted_at = #{acceptedAt}, rejected_at = #{rejectedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE applications SET status = 'withdrawn', withdrawn_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE applications SET status = 'no_show', no_show_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE activity_participants SET join_status = 'no_show', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE source_application_id = #{applicationId}

UPDATE applications SET status = 'accepted_paid', accept_fee_paid = 1, accept_fee_order_id = #{orderId}, conversation_id = #{conversationId}, paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_participants(id, activity_id, user_id, role, join_status, source_application_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{activityId}, #{userId}, 'participant', 'paid', #{applicationId})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity_participants SET join_status = 'paid', source_application_id = #{applicationId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{participantId}

UPDATE activities SET participant_count = ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND join_status IN ('organizer', 'accepted', 'paid') ), accepted_fee_total = accepted_fee_total + #{acceptFeeAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations(id, biz_type, biz_id, title, status, last_message_preview, last_message_seq) VALUES(#{id}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{title}, 'active', '', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM conversation_members WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_members(id, conversation_id, user_id, member_role, can_send, unread_count) VALUES(#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{memberRole}, 1, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_orders SET status = 'success', callback_json = #{callbackJson}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM withdraw_requests WHERE client_request_id = #{clientRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO withdraw_requests(id, request_no, user_id, amount, status, channel, client_request_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{requestNo}, #{userId}, #{amount}, 'pending', #{channel}, #{clientRequestId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM withdraw_requests WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE withdraw_requests SET status = #{status}, reviewer_admin_id = '01ADMIN000000000000000001', reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), paid_at = #{paidAt}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_orders WHERE client_request_id = #{clientRequestId}
SELECT * FROM conversation_members WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY joined_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages( id, conversation_id, message_seq, client_msg_id, sender_user_id, sender_role, msg_type, content_text, ext_json, moderation_status, moderation_reason, client_sent_at, sent_at ) VALUES( #{id}, #{conversationId}, #{messageSeq}, #{clientMsgId}, #{senderUserId}, 'self', #{msgType}, #{contentText}, #{extJson}, #{moderationStatus}, #{moderationReason}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_seq = #{lastMessageSeq}, last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{conversationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND message_seq = #{messageSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation_members SET last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId}, last_read_message_seq = #{lastReadMessageSeq}, last_read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), unread_count = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{membershipId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM conversations WHERE biz_type = 'activity' AND biz_id = #{activityId}

SELECT c.id FROM conversations c INNER JOIN activities a ON c.biz_id = a.id WHERE c.biz_type = 'activity' AND c.status <> 'closed' AND a.activity_status IN ('ended', 'withdrawn', 'archived') LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET status = 'closed', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{conversationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversation_members WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE id = #{conversationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_tickets(id, ticket_no, user_id, source_conversation_id, category, priority, status, tags_json, summary) VALUES(#{id}, #{ticketNo}, #{userId}, #{sourceConversationId}, #{category}, 'normal', 'open', #{tagsJson}, #{summary})
INSERT INTO support_ticket_messages(id, ticket_id, sender_type, sender_id, content_text, attachments_json) VALUES(#{id}, #{ticketId}, 'user', #{senderId}, #{contentText}, #{attachmentsJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE support_tickets SET status = 'pending_agent', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{ticketId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM faq_articles WHERE status = 'published'
AND (title LIKE #{keyword} OR answer_text LIKE #{keyword})
ORDER BY sort_no ASC, updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM support_tickets WHERE id = #{ticketId}
SELECT * FROM support_ticket_messages WHERE id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports(id, reporter_user_id, target_type, target_id, reason_type, content_text, evidence_json, status) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reasonType}, #{contentText}, #{evidenceJson}, 'pending')

INSERT INTO message_moderation_logs(id, user_id, conversation_id, message_id, hit_category, hit_keyword, action, raw_text) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{conversationId}, NULL, #{category}, #{hitKeyword}, #{action}, #{rawText})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reports WHERE id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, reviewer_admin_id = '01ADMIN000000000000000001', decision = #{decision}, decision_remark = #{remark}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{reportId}
UPDATE users SET status = #{userStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_credit SET risk_level = 'high', restricted_until = #{restrictedUntil}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM applications WHERE applicant_user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM applications a INNER JOIN activities ac ON a.activity_id = ac.id WHERE a.applicant_user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'accepted_paid' AND ac.activity_status = 'ended'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM reports WHERE target_type = 'user' AND target_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('pending', 'resolved')
mapper.update: UPDATE user_credit SET credit_score = #{creditScore}, no_show_count = #{noShowCount}, withdraw_count = #{withdrawCount}, complete_count = #{completeCount}, report_count = #{reportCount}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM notifications WHERE read_status = 'unread' GROUP BY user_id LIMIT #{limit} ) t
